en.text: a primitive root; properly, to protrude; used only as denominative from H7165 (for alliteration with H7167), to hunch, i.e. be hump-backed

senses.gloss_en: a primitive root; properly, to protrude; used only as denominative from H7165 (for alliteration with H7167), to hunch, i.e. be hump-backed
